diagrams.title: Basic Computer System Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how CPU, Memory, and I/O devices are connected via system bus
diagrams.purpose: Understanding computer system organization and component interaction

diagrams.title: CPU Internal Architecture
diagrams.description: Internal structure of CPU showing data flow between components
elements: Special Purpose Registers (PC, IR, MAR, MBR)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how CPU executes instructions internally

diagrams.title: Instruction Cycle Flowchart
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the sequence of operations in instruction processing

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows different levels of memory from fastest to slowest
diagrams.purpose: Understanding memory trade-offs between speed, cost, and capacity
